description: 3D Secure / SCA authentication via Braintree for card transactions

client_setup.with_dropin: Pass threeDSecure: true in Drop-in configuration

with_hosted_fields: 1. Tokenize card via hostedFields.tokenize() → get nonce
3. If challenge required: buyer completes in modal/iframe
4. Receive new nonce with 3DS authentication data
5. Send 3DS nonce to server for Transaction.sale()
with_dropin: 3. 3DS handled automatically — returns nonce with auth data

liability_shift.description: Check threeDSecureInfo on the nonce or transaction

fields.liabilityShifted: true = issuer accepts fraud liability (merchant protected)
fields.liabilityShiftPossible: true = 3DS was possible for this card

decision_matrix.shifted_true: Safe to proceed — issuer bears chargeback liability
decision_matrix.shifted_false_possible_true: 3DS available but not completed — consider risk tolerance
decision_matrix.shifted_false_possible_false: 3DS not available for this card — proceed with caution

server_side.description: Braintree server SDK automatically includes 3DS data with the nonce

regional_requirements.Europe_PSD2: SCA required for most electronic payments — 3D Secure satisfies this
regional_requirements.US: 3D Secure optional but recommended for fraud reduction

best_practices: Always pass amount matching the final transaction amount
Include billing address and email for better 3DS pass-through rates
Check liabilityShifted before deciding to proceed
Test with Braintree sandbox 3DS test cards
